reason: Load backend conventions before changing duplicate-upload delete semantics.
This task is primarily about logical deletion, md5 cache repair, and physical-file retention policy.
Delete semantics and not-found/ownership behavior must remain consistent while changing storage-retention policy.
The change needs targeted backend tests and must preserve handler/service/repository boundaries.
Deletion and cache-repair logic should stay centralized instead of forking duplicate code paths.
The policy change spans SQL state, Redis mappings, storage retention, and public access behavior.
